sprint.goal: Fix AAB action-type normalization failure (#1202, KE-2) — root cause of 3,825+ unintended denials/day. Quick-fix MCP prefix match (#1209). Verify heredoc false-positive closed (#1208). Complete date command scanner safe-subshell allowlist (#1139).

senior.title: AAB normalization failure (KE-2 ActionContext design + rtk-prefix stripping) + MCP prefix match quick fix
senior.note: #1202 is the new P1 — AAB produces 'unknown' action type for rtk-prefixed commands and git worktree pipelines, causing 3,825 unintended default-deny decisions in 5.5 days (700/day). Fix requires: (1) strip known wrapper prefixes (rtk, time, timeout) in aab.ts before pattern matching; (2) classify embedded sub-operations in compound commands; (3) emit UnknownActionType WARNING event for monitoring. #1209 is a quick fix (1 hour): MCP server name matching in aab.ts needs prefix/substring match instead of exact-match for tools like 'github-mcp-server-actions_list'. Do #1209 first as warm-up for #1202. #1208 (heredoc path string false positive) needs verification — PR #1212 per-token fix may not cover heredoc body text; senior to test and patch if still live. #1139 (date command scanner) continues as P2.

coverageGaps.description: AAB normalization: no tests for rtk-prefixed commands or git worktree pipelines — both fall through to 'unknown' action type
MCP server prefix match: no tests for github-mcp-server-* sub-tool names being blocked
Heredoc body path strings: need test that cat > /tmp/file << EOF ... .agentguard/... EOF does NOT trigger no-governance-self-modification

completedIssues.note: Fixed by PR #1212 (persona.env operational exemption in no-governance-self-modification invariant). Issue closed by EM 2026-03-28T11:30Z.
Closed by PR #1212. PR #1213 (duplicate fix, CI green) correctly closed as superseded.
Prettier format on claude-hook.ts already fixed — confirmed clean 2026-03-28T11:30Z. Closed by EM.
